idea-plugin.name: IDE Agent for Copilot
idea-plugin.description:
IDE Agent for Copilot transforms GitHub Copilot from a chat assistant into a coding agent inside your JetBrains IDE.

Instead of suggesting code in isolation, the agent can plan and execute multi-step tasks using the same IDE capabilities you use every day — navigation, refactoring, inspections, testing, build tools, and Git — all within a single conversation.

What Makes It Different

Traditional AI assistants generate code snippets. This agent can:

  • Navigate your project structure
  • Modify multiple files coherently
  • Run inspections and refactorings
  • Execute tests and builds
  • Diagnose errors and fix them
  • Perform Git operations
  • Iterate until the task is complete

All actions happen directly through the IDE — not through simulated edits or external tools.

Works for Tasks of Any Size

Use it as:

  • An everyday coding assistant
  • A tool for repetitive multi-file changes
  • A helper for fixing failing tests or build issues
  • A refactoring assistant
  • A way to explore unfamiliar codebases
  • An autonomous agent for larger end-to-end tasks

Start small or go big — the agent adapts to the scope of your request.

Privacy & Local-First Design

  • No telemetry
  • No data collection
  • No external services (beyond GitHub Copilot)
  • All operations executed locally inside your IDE
  • Your code never leaves your environment except through Copilot itself

Ideal for privacy-sensitive or enterprise environments.

Requirements

  • A supported JetBrains IDE
  • GitHub Copilot plugin installed and authenticated
  • An active GitHub Copilot subscription

Open Source

This plugin is open source under the Apache 2.0 License.
Source code, issues, and contributions: github.com/catatafishen/ide-agent-for-copilot

This plugin is an independent open-source project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by GitHub or JetBrains.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Introduces IDE Agent for Copilot
  • Dynamic model discovery — automatically supports all Copilot models without plugin updates
  • Enables multi-step task execution inside the IDE
  • Project navigation and context awareness
  • Multi-file editing capabilities
  • Integration with inspections and refactorings
  • Test and build execution support
  • Git operation support
  • Local-first design with no telemetry
